meta.title: Candidates - Baara
meta.description: A fairer evaluation based on evidence. Work sample ≤ 60 min, transparent criteria.

hero.title: A fairer evaluation,
hero.subtitle: At Baara, we evaluate you on what you can do — not your ability to "sell yourself".
hero.benefit1: Short work sample: ≤ 60 min, can be split

form.title: Join the waitlist
form.subtitle: Be among the first to access Baara
form.name: Your name
form.terms: By signing up, you accept our terms of service

pause.title: Pausable
pause.description: Save and resume whenever you want.

criteria.title: Explicit criteria
criteria.description: Rubrics are visible before you start.

proofProfile.label: Your proof profile
proofProfile.title: Build your Proof Profile
proofProfile.subtitle: A reusable profile that shows what you can really do.

contains.title: What's in your profile
contains.item1: What's proven (with links to your work)
contains.item3: Reusable evidence: PRs, docs, write-ups, exercises

benefits.title: Why it's useful
benefits.item1: You repeat less of the same information
benefits.item2: You save time on future applications
benefits.item3: You show your true value, even without a "perfect CV"

noOss.label: Accessible to all
noOss.title: No public GitHub? No problem.
noOss.subtitle: Proof of competence can take many forms:
noOss.note: What matters isn't having open source code, but being able to clearly explain what you did and why.

consent.title: Explicit consent
consent.description: Nothing is shared without your agreement.

takehome.question: Is this a multi-hour take-home?
takehome.answer: No. The work sample takes ≤ 60 min total, and you can split it. No 4-hour project to submit.

freeWork.question: Is this free work for the company?
freeWork.answer: No. Exercises are neutral: no proprietary code, no deliverable the company can use.

oss.question: Am I disadvantaged without OSS contributions?
oss.answer: No. You can demonstrate your skills with project explanations, resolved incidents, or exercises. OSS is not required.

accessibility.question: Can I request an adapted format?
accessibility.answer: Yes. You can request an alternative format or adapted timing based on your needs.

whoSees.question: Who sees my results?
whoSees.answer: Only the company you're applying to, and only with your consent.

cta.title: Ready to show what you can do?
cta.description: Join candidates who have chosen to let their work speak for them.
cta.secondaryButton: Got an invitation? Follow the link.
